message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Actor" as actor
participant ":Chantier" as chantier
participant "jmb:Artisan" as jmb
participant "q:Qualif" as q
participant "real : Realiser" as real

actor -> chantier : getPayeArtisan(jmb)
chantier -> q : getQualif()
chantier -> q : getTauxH()

loop [ForEach real]
  chantier -> real : getArtisan()
  opt [a == jmb]
    chantier -> real : getDuree()
    chantier : duree += d
  end
end

chantier --> actor : duree*tauxH

@enduml
